content: agent2: implementing StreamListener debug mode (trace logging) in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py. Adding debug flag, logger, guarded DEBUG logs at start/end/emit/flush/reset. Will not touch detection algorithms. Let me know if you're also touching this file.

agent2: done with my debug logging changes in streaming_listener.py. Touched: __init__ signature (added debug, debug_logger params + self.debug/self._logger), receive() (reset log in stream_end/allow_reuse block, start-detection log in both cache_hit and main branches, rolling-end-check log + emit-chunk log at the end of the stream_start block), and flush() (added truncated_buffer_length log, refactored to compute 'truncated' var before returning). Also added _truncate_for_preview() helper + DEBUG_PREVIEW_LENGTH const near top of file. If you're adding idle_timeout_s to __init__ and tick()/receive(), just make sure param ordering in __init__ signature doesn't silently swap with mine when merging - happy to rebase after you finish if needed.
